title: CUCUMI 12pcs 3.4oz Small Glass Jars with Lids, 100ml Candy Jars Potion Bottles with Cork, Mini Jars Set for Party Wedding Favors Halloween Décor
description:
About this item
【Package includes】Each package includes 12 glass bottles with cork lids, 25 Kraft paper labels and 20m Burlap Ribbon.
【Dimension】The size of the mini glass favor jar is 4" x 2" (10cm x 5cm) , 3.4oz, the Kraft paper label is 0.75" x 1.25" (2cm x 3.2cm), burlap ribbon is 20m.
【Product makings】Our small glass bottles are made of high premium-quality clear glass, which is sturdy and reliable. The substance of stopper is wooden and is not easy to drop residue that can be firmly plugged bottle mouth.
【Used】The function of small glass jars are spell jars, potion bottles, herb jars, milk bottles, propagation jars and can be used for party and wedding decoration.
【Function】The function of small glass jars are spell jars, potion bottles, apothecary bottles, herb jars, milk bottles, propagation jars which can be used for party, wedding decoration and gifts of Halloween and Christmas Day.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: These were just what I needed for a favor for drive by baby shower. I had found baby shower themed ones that were twice the price but would go for these again and again. They are plain which is perfect because I got to personalize them to what I wanted and I thought they turned out perfect. Put cute tags and filled them with pink kisses with personalized stickers. I also really like that guests can reuse them for whatever they want since all they have to do is remove the tag and ribbon. All came well packaged and none were damaged.I bought these for my new sand collection. I love the old vintage aesthetic of these bottles they were exactly what I was looking for! I only needed 4 but good news is I have plenty left for my collection to grow. Very pleased with this purchase I definitely recommend.I needed this for a project I couldn't wait to complete. These are small enough to hide and large enough to fill with anything including a landscape view.Sadly, one jar broke. I didn't love cleaning the shards of glass off of everything, but I suppose that's a risk when you order glass. Love the jars, though. They were accurately sized and perfect for my crafting need!Just what I needed them for!Glad I purchased this itemMy kids liked these for making potions, they are a good size for it.These mini bottles are fantastic. I use them to make health shots for family and friends and people want to keep the little bottles that's how cute they are. The cork top does work and so far they have not broken like some people in the reviews have said. Just be gentle with them and it should work fine. Press firmly and its leak proof. I was a bit concerned about the cork absorbing the orange from turmeric etc. but it doesn't so after each use just wash it and its brand new again. I have to reorder them because so many people want to keep them for themselves, I have "lost" half of them lol Recently I had people over for a Friendsgiving and my friends wanted to take them home so for Christmas Ill be making these into little favors filled with coquito... YUM.The glass bottles were the perfect size. Very thick glass and the cork stoppers fit them very well.Well I'm just gonna say I absolutely love these little jars! With the cork tops, I use bees wax to seal depending on what you decide to use them for!
reviews_1s:
good jars, size neededThe cork tops technically fit in, but they just sit there. They're either loose enough to fall out or you can push and the cork will just fall into the bottle.Three of the twelve jars arrived broken.Play Video
all but 2 of the corks on my order were loose, and some of them wouldnt even stick regardless of how much pressure you put on.

several of them were also dirty or had bubbles or seams in the glass that affected the look. very disappointed as i was going to use these as nice gifts. will be returning.Bought these to fill with candy as party favors for a baby shower. First order arrived with one jar completely broken, so I returned it for another package. Second package arrived seemingly in tact. So I started cleaning the jars before filling with candy. One jar was chipped at the rim in a non-obvious way and sliced my finger in the process of cleaning. Blood everywhere and now I have a scar on my finger. Photos attached. Beware!!My box of bottles did not come with the lids that were advertised, very disappointing.Feel like I got ripped off, corks don't seal so they are totally worthless. Never buy this again, thinking of cancelling my membership since this is the third time I received something that was broke or didn't work.I ordered this product for a special project I had. I finally received it, and there were NO cork lids, string or cards with it. I read, and re-read the description to make sure. Yup, I got ripped offBought these to fill with homemade hot chocolate mix and the corks are too small. Basically I'm sitting here crying because now my party favors are totally ruined the night before.it doesn't matter how much i push the cork into 3/4 of them... it keeps popping out which is horrible when trying to use for herbs... and because i want to use the herbs in them, I can't just glue it down.
